title: codereview pass 2: deaddrop_get/post ignore query params for node filtering per LCI spec 17.5.8 and 12-apps.md; no OSCORE check; no SenML encode on GET; robustness for buffer full uses hardcoded 32
description: Finding from codereview pass 2. Per spec rate limits, provider callbacks for DTN/SenML must be wired. File as codereview bead. Fix all.
